name: BARNWELL INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Barnwell Industries, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company operating since 1956 in two segments: Oil and Natural Gas, and Land Investment. The oil and gas segment develops, produces, acquires, and sells crude oil and natural gas in Alberta, Canada (primarily the Twining field), Oklahoma, and Texas. The land investment segment holds land interests in Hawaii. The company sold its contract drilling subsidiary, Water Resources International, in March 2025.
